nonBlockingIssues.description: Root openapi.json appears stale relative to current /price query params; static artifact drift risk.
Inline INDEX_HTML UI does not expose newer /price params (skip_cache, ignore_pools, silent), creating API/UI drift.
No endpoint-level assertion currently verifies /price response shape includes block_timestamp; behavior is covered via helper/cache tests.
timeout_protection unit test intentionally waits ~5s due real timeout path, slowing suite.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md with testing constraints: autouse y-module mocking fixture, FastAPI lifespan/TestClient limitation, asyncio_mode=auto note, and static openapi.json drift warning.
Updated .factory/library/user-testing.md to document /health response includes synced and that sync checks can add ~5s latency on timeout.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit testing guidance that FastAPI TestClient/lifespan can trigger brownie network startup and should be avoided for this repo; prefer helper-level tests with mocks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Observed in block-timestamp review where worker spent multiple steps attempting TestClient before reverting to helper-level tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: In Docker verification procedure, include explicit step to restart nginx after container recreation when routing returns backend unavailable due cached DNS.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: docker-rebuild-verify found reproducible nginx stale DNS behavior after rebuild; workaround already documented in .factory/library/environment.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define policy for keeping static openapi.json and inline INDEX_HTML UI synchronized with API contract changes (either mandatory regeneration/update or explicitly out-of-scope).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: new-price-params and block-timestamp reviews both identified API/UI/spec drift risk from manual artifacts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document expected handling for detect-secrets baseline state to avoid repeated --no-verify commits when .secrets.baseline is present but untracked.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: new-price-params review noted workaround via --no-verify because detect-secrets hook expected tracked baseline file.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add nginx resolver directive as part of this scrutiny run.
Treat one worker's non-strict TDD execution order as a process failure.
nginx restart-after-recreate note missing from library.
